summary: Validated bug fixes: Excel import creates one record per subconjunto (ESF-0001 = 6 motors), status='Sem diag.' default, dashboard health_index=0 when no diagnostics, status_dist includes 'Sem diag.', viewer 403 on import, and frontend cards show 'Sem diag.' badge + 'Últ. diag: <date>' when applicable.
passed: All imported machines have status='Sem diag.' (Status dist: {'Sem diag.': 213})
Viewer login -> POST /api/machines/import returns 403 with detail 'Permissão negada: usuário somente leitura'
Frontend /diagnostico Cards mode: Motor 01 card shows 'OK' + 'Últ. diag: 2026-06-30'
Frontend /diagnostico Cards mode: Motor 02-06 cards show 'Sem diag.' badge + 'Sem diagnóstico' text

failed.issue: When creating a diagnostic with fields {diagnostic, recommendation}, the response stored empty strings for diagnostico/causa/consequencia/recomendacao and machine_tag is empty. Status was applied correctly (OK).

action_items: Optional: align /api/diagnostics input schema with frontend field names so diagnostico/causa/consequencia/recomendacao/machine_tag are populated.
